arts.ttl: Man United 'seriously discussing' Erik ten Hag sack as four replacements identified
arts.sum: Newcastle United head coach Eddie Howe and the unattached Graham Potter are supposedly two of the leading contenders to replace Erik ten Hag as Manchester United boss.

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Porto – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to face FC Porto in the Europa League on Thursday evening, with Erik ten Hag’s team in need of a response to recent results. A dismal defeat at home to Tottenham Hotspur at the weekend has increased the pressure on Ten Hag’s position. The Red Devils sit 12th in the Premier League […] The post Manchester United XI vs Porto – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop Donny van de Beek finally ends nightmare - before reality bites
arts.sum: Dutch international Donny van de Beek has had a tough few years but left Mancheter United for Girona in a cut-price move and has returned to Champions League action

arts.ttl: Class of 92 star has explained why Manchester United might not sack Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure following an indifferent start to the season, but Man United are sticking by him for now and Nicky Butt agrees.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fume over £100m Greenwood mistake
arts.sum: Greenwood departed Man Utd in the summer to join Ligue 1 side Marseille in a deal worth just £22m (€26m). GiveMeSport reports: “Key figures within Manchester United expected Greenwood to go on and become a £100million talent after seeing him break into the first-team picture following his progress through the youth ranks, and they remain extremely disappointed to have lost out on securing a potential nine-figure sum in the future.”

arts.ttl: Man City equal Champions League record originally set by Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester City's 4-0 win over Slovan Bratislava on Tuesday got Pep Guardiola's side up and running in the Champions League for the season, having been held by Inter on matchday one. United returned to the final a year later, going through 12 more games unbeaten in 2008/09, but then lost against an ultimately treble-winning Barcelona side in Rome.

arts.ttl: Man United given huge concern as Paul Scholes agrees with Gary Lineker about Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a dismal start to the new Premier League season, and their struggles have been laid bare in recent weeks, leaving Erik ten Hag under increasing pressure

arts.ttl: Andy Dunn's Man Utd Q&A - Five key questions for Erik ten Hag amid growing Old Trafford crisis
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED Q&A: Our Chief Sports Writer Andy Dunn answers YOUR questions on the growing issues at Manchester United ahead of their Europa League clash with Porto

arts.ttl: Liverpool Firm Admirers of 70m Man Utd Target and Could Make January Bid
arts.sum: Liverpool are firm admirers of Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite and could hijack Manchester Uniteds plans to pursue the Englishman in 2025.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes on same page as Gary Lineker as Erik ten Hag's Man Utd job hangs in balance
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Paul Scholes admitted Manchester United are going backwards in terms of progress following a disastrous start to the season which has seen them slip to 13th in the table
